Bash(.venv/Scripts/python -c "
import polars as pl
from pathlib import Path
import tempfile
with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory\(\) as td:
    dp = Path\(td\) / 'data'
    dp.mkdir\(\)
    fp = dp / 'input.parquet'
    pl.DataFrame\({'x': [1,2,3]}\).write_parquet\(fp\)
    code = \(
        'import haute\\n'
        'pipeline = haute.Pipeline\(\\"test\\"\)\\n'
        '\\n'
        f'@pipeline.data_source\(path=\\"{fp}\\"\)\\n'
        'def source\(config\):\\n'
        '    pass\\n'
        '\\n'
        '@pipeline.transform\(\)\\n'
        'def my_transform\(df\):\\n'
        '    return df\\n'
    \)
    py = Path\(td\) / 'test_pipeline.py'
    py.write_text\(code\)
    from haute.parser import parse_pipeline_file
    g = parse_pipeline_file\(py\)
    for n in g.nodes:
        print\(f'{n.id} -> {n.data.label} \({n.data.nodeType}\)'\)
")
